how.title: Three steps. Ninety seconds.
how.lead: Zero setup. Zero security expertise. Real, prioritised findings — with fixes you can copy-paste.
how.step1Desc: Drop in any public URL — staging, production, or that thing you shipped last night. No CLI, no DNS setup, no agent install.
how.step2Desc: Security headers, secrets in JS bundles, TLS configuration, accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA criteria via Lighthouse), Core Web Vitals, SEO meta — all under 90 seconds.
how.step3Desc: Every finding ships with a copy-ready prompt for Cursor, v0, Bolt, Lovable, or Replit. Apply the fix, re-scan, ship.

features.title: Everything you need to ship with confidence
features.lead: From security to SEO, we check it all — so you don't have to.
features.securityDesc: 15 security modules detect exposed secrets (700+ patterns), missing headers, XSS, CORS issues, and vulnerable dependencies.
features.codeDesc: Catch secrets before deployment with GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Bitbucket Pipelines integration.
features.perfDesc: Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse scores, image optimization, render-blocking resources, and more.
features.perfTags: ✓ LCP, FCP, CLS  ✓ Lighthouse  ✓ Mobile perf
features.a11yDesc: WCAG 2.2 checks, color contrast, keyboard navigation, screen-reader compatibility.
features.aiDesc: Every finding includes a ready-to-paste fix prompt for Cursor, v0, Bolt, Lovable, or Replit.

activeBanner.title: We try to break your site — so attackers can't
activeBanner.body: Beyond passive checks: Codifie Scan actually sends attack probes — SQL injection, XSS payloads, API fuzzing — against your verified domain. You get CONFIRMED exploitable findings, not guesses.

codeBanner.title: Catch secrets before they ship — in your repo
codeBanner.body: Connect your GitHub repo and Codifie Scan scans every PR for hardcoded API keys, secrets, and security anti-patterns — before they ever reach production.

comparison.title: Codifie Scan vs. the old way
comparison.lead: A manual security audit takes weeks and costs thousands. Traditional SaaS scanners need DNS, agents, and security expertise. Codifie Scan takes 90 seconds.
comparison.caption: Comparison of Codifie Scan vs manual audits and traditional scanners

faq.title: Common questions
faq.lead: If you don't see your question here, email support@vibesafe.app — a real human answers.
faq.q1: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a1: No. Codifie Scan is a passive black-box scanner — paste a URL and we hit it from the outside, just like a real attacker would. No CLI, no agent, no SDK, no code changes.
faq.q2: Will scanning my site break anything?
faq.a2: Passive scans are read-only — they only fetch public URLs your browser already fetches. Active DAST tests are opt-in, rate-limited to 1 request per second, identify themselves with an X-Scanner header, and require you to verify ownership of the domain first.
faq.q3: Is this useful for AI-built sites specifically?
faq.a3: Yes — AI coding tools love to inline secrets, ship sourcemaps, and skip security headers. Our scanner is tuned for the patterns we see in Lovable, Bolt, v0, Cursor, and Replit exports. Every finding includes an AI fix prompt you can paste straight back into the same tool.
faq.a4: 15 security modules (secrets, headers, TLS, cookies, CORS, sourcemaps, mixed content, subdomain takeover, third-party scripts, DNS/email, exposed dev interfaces, error disclosure, robots/sitemap, caching, sensitive paths), 6 performance modules (Core Web Vitals, resources, network, JS, server response, mobile), 5 accessibility modules (contrast, keyboard, screen-reader, semantic HTML, forms), and 5 SEO modules (meta tags, social, structured data, crawlability, mobile SEO).
faq.q5: How is this different from Lighthouse or Snyk?
faq.a5: Lighthouse only measures performance and surface-level SEO. Snyk needs your source code and focuses on dependencies. Codifie Scan runs against your live URL, covers security + performance + accessibility + SEO in one report, and writes the fix for you. Think of it as Lighthouse + OWASP ZAP + Gitleaks + a developer-grade AI assistant, in a 90-second pass.
faq.a6: Never. Credits roll over indefinitely and work across any number of domains. If you decide it isn't for you within 30 days, we'll refund any unused credits.

finalCta.title: Ready to ship with confidence?
finalCta.lead: Free tier includes 3 full scans every month. No credit card required.

pricing.metaTitle: Pricing — One free scan a week, pay for active testing
pricing.metaDesc: Free tier: 1 fully-unlocked passive scan a week. Verify ($0): one active DAST scan. Active Pack ($0): 5 DAST scans. Monitor ($0/mo): unlimited passive scans + regression alerts.
pricing.ogTitle: Codifie Scan Pricing — Free passive scanning, pay for proof
pricing.ogDesc: Passive scans are free with login. Active DAST testing (real attack probes) starts at $0. Monitoring at $0/mo per domain.
pricing.heroTitle: Passive scanning is free. Pay only to prove findings are real.
pricing.heroLead: One full passive scan a week is free (sign-in required). Pay for active DAST testing or continuous monitoring.
pricing.freeDesc: All findings shown. All AI fix prompts visible. PDF export included. The weekly quota is the only limit — no hidden findings, no Pro Lock.
pricing.freeUpsell: Need a second scan in the same week? Upgrade below.
pricing.paidLead: Active DAST testing sends real attack probes against a verified domain. Replaces a manual pentest at 0.2% of the cost.

verify.name: Verify
verify.f1: 1 active DAST scan on a verified domain

monitor.name: Monitor
monitor.f1: Unlimited passive scans on the domain

faqs.q1: Is the free tier really fully unlocked?
faqs.a1: Yes. One passive scan per week, all findings shown, all AI fix prompts visible, PDF export available. The weekly quota is the only limit — there is no "X findings hidden" banner or paywall inside the report.
faqs.q2: What counts against the weekly quota?
faqs.a2: Each completed passive scan you start while signed in. Anonymous scans run on a separate IP-based rate limit (10/hour). You need to sign in to view the report.
faqs.q3: What is an active DAST scan?
faqs.a3: Real attack probes (SQL injection, XSS, auth bypass, API fuzzing) sent against a verified domain. Rate-limited, opt-in, identifies itself with an X-Scanner header. Replaces a $5,000 manual pentest for $0.
faqs.q4: Why charge for active testing but not passive?
faqs.a4: Passive scanning is HTTP + pattern matching — near-zero marginal cost. Active testing burns real compute and requires domain verification. We charge for the expensive thing.
faqs.a5: Yes. 30-day money-back guarantee on Verify and Active Pack. Monitor subscriptions are pro-rated.
faqs.a6: Team tier (multi-domain, RBAC, audit log, SAML) is on the roadmap. Email sales@vibesafe.app to get on the early list.

verify.metaDesc: Verify ownership of a domain before running active security tests. Choose DNS TXT record or HTML meta tag — or use our guided walkthrough.
verify.heroLead: Active security tests send real attack probes. We require proof of ownership to keep your scans legal under CFAA and to make sure no one else gets to break your site for you.
verify.askDomainHint: Enter the bare domain — no https://, no path.
verify.initError: We couldn't initialize verification. Please try again.
verify.whyBody: Active scans send actual attack probes. The US Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (and its global equivalents) make this illegal without authorization. Verifying ownership is your authorization — it's a one-time setup and can be removed any time.
verify.dnsHint: Cloudflare · Namecheap · GoDaddy · Route 53 · Google Domains
verify.metaTagSub: Use if you can edit your site's HTML
verify.metaStep2: Deploy your site so it's live
verify.guidedHelp: Pick your platform — we'll show you exactly where to paste the verification.
verify.devViewLink: ← I'd rather see the developer view
verify.verifiedOk: ✓ Verified — you can now run active tests.
verify.verifyFailFallback: Couldn't find the record yet. DNS can take up to an hour — try again shortly.
verify.tooManyChecks: Too many checks — try again in a moment.
verify.tooManyChecksRetry: Too many checks — try again in {seconds} second{plural}.

banners.overrunBody: Your scan is still running. LLM enrichment or a slow target can push past the ETA — we'll redirect when it finishes.
banners.stuckBody: We haven't heard from the scanner in 30 seconds. The connection may have dropped, or the scanner may have stalled.

failed.matrixBody: something went wrong. retry, or share scan_id={scanId} with support.
failed.title: Scan failed
failed.body: Something went wrong on our end and the scan didn't finish. Try again — or share the scan ID with support if it keeps failing.

docs.metaDesc: Codifie Scan documentation — quick start, active testing, API reference, webhooks, CI/CD integration, fix prompts, and FAQ. Everything you need to ship a secure AI-built site.
docs.ogDesc: Quick start, active testing, API reference, webhooks, CI/CD integration, and more.
docs.heroTitle: Everything you need to ship secure
docs.heroLead: Get started in 60 seconds, integrate with your CI, or dig into the API.

quickStart.p1: Codifie Scan runs a full passive scan in 90 seconds. No signup is required to test a site — paste a URL and you're scanning.
quickStart.step1: Go to the homepage and paste your URL into the scan bar.
quickStart.step2: Wait ~90 seconds while we run 15 security modules.
quickStart.step3: Review the findings — each ships with a paste-ready AI fix prompt.
quickStart.step4: Paste the prompt into Cursor, Lovable, Bolt, v0, or Replit and ship the fix.
quickStart.tip: Tip: Free scans surface the top 5 critical findings. Upgrade to see every finding and unlock active testing.

activeTesting.p1: Active testing sends real attack probes (SQLi, XSS, auth bypass, API fuzzing) against a domain you own. Findings are CONFIRMED exploitable, never speculative.
activeTesting.prereq1: Verify ownership of the target domain (DNS TXT record or HTML meta tag).
activeTesting.prereq2: 3 credits per active test (~$0). Replaces a $5,000 manual pentest.
activeTesting.prereq3: Probes are rate-limited and run from a fixed IP block so you can allowlist them.
activeTesting.durationBody: ~8 minutes on average for a 5-page site. Larger surfaces scale linearly.

apiReference.p1: Every dashboard action is available over the REST API. Authenticate with a bearer token from your dashboard.
apiReference.descVerify: Verify a DNS TXT or meta tag

webhooks.p1: Subscribe to scan lifecycle events. We retry failed deliveries with exponential backoff up to 8 times.
webhooks.evFindingCritical: fired the moment a critical finding is detected

cicd.p1: Block merges on regressions. The Codifie Scan CLI exits non-zero if your grade drops or new critical findings appear vs. the last main-branch scan.

fixPrompts.p1: Every finding ships with a paste-ready prompt tuned for your AI assistant. Prompts are versioned and include the surrounding code context.
fixPrompts.sCursor: Cursor — drops into ⌘K with the file already open
fixPrompts.sReplit: Replit Agent — pasted into the Agent chat
fixPrompts.note: Note: Prompts include framework hints (Next.js, Vite, Rails, etc.) so the assistant generates idiomatic fixes.

faq.q1: Do you store the scanned site's content?
faq.a1: We store findings, a screenshot, and request/response samples for findings — never the full site. All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and deleted after 90 days on free, 365 days on paid.
faq.q2: Is this legal for sites I don't own?
faq.a2: Passive scans are legal anywhere — they only access publicly available data. Active scans require domain ownership verification (CFAA compliance).
faq.a3: Self-host is on the Enterprise tier — contact sales for details.
faq.a4: Every active-test finding is CONFIRMED exploitable (we capture a proof-of-exploit payload). Passive findings have a confidence score; high-confidence findings have a false-positive rate below 0.5%.
